basic_details.job_title: ICAR IVRI Junior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI) has released the official Junior Research Assistant Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ICAR IVRI Junior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 28 years of age with qualifications such as M.Sc. (Agri), M.Sc., M.Pharm., MVSc., B.E./B.Tech., or equivalent degree can attend the walk-in interview on 05 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Agri)., M.Sc., M.Pharm., MVSc., Bachelor of Engg/Technology (B.E./B.Tech.) or equivalent degree
qualification.details: Junior Research Assistant: M.Sc. (Agri)., M.Sc., M.Pharm., MVSc., Bachelor of Engg/Technology (B.E./B.Tech.) or equivalent degree with 1st class in graduate and post-graduate examination. Experience in tissue engineering, cell culture techniques, Molecular Biology tools/ Bioinformatics, working experience with lab animals, and National Eligibility Tests- CSIR/UGC/ICAR NET including lectureship (assistant professorship) or GATE is desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 25,000/- pm for 1st and 2nd Year and Rs 28,000/- pm for 3rd year
salary_details.details: Rs 25,000/- pm for 1st and 2nd Year and Rs 28,000/- pm for 3rd year

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Junior Research Assistant at the Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Junior Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.Sc. (Agri)., M.Sc., M.Pharm., MVSc., or Bachelor of Engg/Technology (B.E./B.Tech.) or equivalent degree with a 1st class in graduate and post-graduate examinations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Assistant post is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs 25,000/- pm for the 1st and 2nd year, and Rs 28,000/- pm for the 3rd year.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 05 June 2026 at 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the committee room of the Division of Physiology and Climatology, ICAR-IVRI, Izatnagar, Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
